User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the CareerCraft AI application, storing their profile information, role, and company affiliation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity (Firebase UID).

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

companyId.description: The unique identifier for the company/agency the user belongs to.

plan.description: The subscription plan of the user (e.g., 'free', 'premium').

onboardingStep.description: Tracks the user's progress through the initial onboarding flow.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

ModelInfo.title: ModelInfo
ModelInfo.description: Metadata about an AI model fetched from the provider.

ModelRegistry.title: ModelRegistry
ModelRegistry.description: A collection of available AI models stored in the database.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Auth: Only the user with matching userId can read/write their own document.
Global storage for the latest fetched list of AI models. Publicly readable, write restricted to Developers.
